entities.name: CONSTRUCTED WETLAND
entities.description: A field-scale system used for the treatment of rural wastewater to improve management and water use efficiency

entities.name: RURAL WASTEWATER
entities.description: Wastewater generated from households in rural areas that requires treatment

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Resource-scarce climatic regions characterized by limited water availability

entities.name: WASTEWATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of treating and managing wastewater to improve environmental and resource efficiency

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The measure of how effectively water is utilized for agricultural or domestic purposes

entities.name: KOTHAPALLY VILLAGE
entities.description: The specific village in Telangana, India, where the constructed wetland was commissioned

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: The state in India where Kothapally village is located

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: TYPHA LATIFOLIA
entities.description: A plant species used for vegetation in the constructed wetland

entities.name: CANNA INDICA
entities.description: A plant species used for vegetation in the constructed wetland

entities.name: COD
entities.description: Chemical Oxygen Demand, a measure of water quality and organic pollution

entities.name: SULFATE
entities.description: A chemical compound removed during the wastewater treatment process

entities.name: INORGANIC NITROGEN
entities.description: A nutrient removed during the wastewater treatment process

entities.name: TOTAL COLIFORM
entities.description: Bacteria used as an indicator of water quality and treatment efficiency

entities.name: FARM POND
entities.description: A structure used to store treated wastewater for subsequent irrigation

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of treated wastewater to agricultural fields to support crop growth

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A crop cultivated during the rabi season using treated wastewater

entities.name: RABI
entities.description: The winter cropping season in South Asia

entities.name: SWEETCORN
entities.description: A crop cultivated during the summer season using treated wastewater

entities.name: SUMMER
entities.description: The hot season used for cultivating sweetcorn

entities.name: DRY SPELLS
entities.description: Periods of abnormally dry weather that increase crop vulnerability

entities.name: KHARIF
entities.description: The monsoon cropping season in South Asia

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: Organic material harvested from the constructed wetland

entities.name: FODDER
entities.description: Livestock feed derived from the harvested biomass of the wetland

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Animals that are fed with biomass harvested from the constructed wetland
